title: Python removal decision
decision_summary: Do not remove Python from the normal Prism runtime path. Treat retained Python ownership as the release strategy for critical surfaces not yet safely owned by Go.

critical_surfaces_without_live_go_owners: live category/tag writes beyond local copied-DB candidates
cleanup, export/import, and server backup/log surfaces
rollback owner and normal Pi prism.service runtime
decision_basis.accepted_release_strategy: retained Python normal path with bounded Go local/read candidates
go_role_after_decision: bounded read implementation/candidate surfaces remain available only where explicitly routed or locally smoked
flag-gated DB-only write candidates remain local/copied-DB only
flag-gated attachment text JSON candidate remains local/copied-DB-and-files only
local packaged Go artifact remains a smoke/release artifact path, not the Pi normal runtime owner

normal_runtime_strategy.deployment_target: Raspberry Pi systemd + Caddy remains the real operating target
normal_runtime_strategy.local_artifact_role: Go packaged artifact is retained as a local smoke/package-readiness path
normal_runtime_strategy.rollback_owner: Python prism.service and existing Pi data dir remain rollback owner
normal_runtime_strategy.migrations_owner: Python migrations.run_migrations() remains live migration owner
normal_runtime_strategy.frontend_static_owner: Flask/Python production path remains live static owner

blocked_actions_after_decision: Remove Python backend, venv, or prism.service from the normal path
Route production file/upload/import/export/cleanup/server maintenance to Go
Replace Python migration runner with Go migration runner
Change frontend default API target to Go
Remove Pillow or Python thumbnail path through this gate
Expose Prism directly to public internet

allowed_next_step.title: Final stabilization window
allowed_next_step.scope: Verify retained-Python final state with local packaged artifact smoke, frontend build/browser/API checks, full pytest, Pi backup/sync/restart/live checks, route ownership checks, and rollback evidence. Do not remove Python or expand Go ownership.

parallel_deferred_track.title: Go WebP encoder dependency decision
parallel_deferred_track.scope: Thumbnail ownership remains separate; Pillow removal is not authorized by 23.10.2.
